description_long: This is a yellow emergency vehicle resembling a police car, featuring a robust, boxy build with a pickup-style rear bed. The vehicle is adorned with a prominent red and blue horizontal stripe running along both sides, and it has blacked-out windows and wheels. On the roof, there is a blue emergency light bar, and the front grille is accented with a red bumper. The rear bed is open, with compartments and storage areas visible, suggesting utility for carrying equipment. The side mirrors are black, and the vehicle has a utilitarian, functional design typical of urban emergency response vehicles. No visible police insignia or text markings are present, but the color scheme and light bar indicate its emergency function.
description: A yellow emergency police vehicle with red and blue stripes, a blue roof light bar, and a pickup-style rear bed. It has blacked-out windows and a red-accented front bumper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blacked-out windshield, red-accented bumper, and blue roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the red and blue horizontal stripe, black wheels, and open rear bed with compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open bed, rear compartments, and taillights, with no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same stripe, compartments, and emergency light bar.
attribute_emergency_lights: A blue rectangular emergency light bar is mounted on the roof, centrally positioned. No other emergency lights are visible on the grille or rear.
